title: POD / Dolphin POD
open_questions: Verify official Dolphin/dphnAI social links, live GPU utilization, revenue, buyback wallet, circulating supply methodology, and unlock schedule.

title: GEOD / GEODNET
open_questions: Bad Elf commercial terms and GEO-PULSE availability are verified, but no order/active-device count or GIP-14 artifact exists; monitor station/customer growth, service-vs-hardware revenue attribution and transaction-level burns, plus canonical contracts, unlocks and contributor roles.

title: META / MetaDAO
open_questions: Verify MetaDAO 2.0 contracts/NAV bands; reproduce documented sale mechanics and Credible $4M settlement onchain, including allocation concentration, platform fees and META value accrual; verify canonical token source and aggregate launch metrics.

title: BANKR / BankrCoin
open_questions: Reproduce Bankr's nearly $11M/48h stock-paired-volume claim from stable API/onchain history; map pool quote tokens/contracts, exact creator/treasury fee splits and stock balances, and map labeled Bankr fees to net revenue plus any BNKR/Club route; continue bridge/pool, rewards and deprecated-vault checks.

title: AEON Framework / aeon
category: Base AI agents / autonomous agent framework
open_questions: Verify tokenomics/controls/holders, attested-run and ADK adoption, tenant isolation and downstream patching. Aggregate MiroShark repeat buyers are confirmed; reopen the promised AEON buyback only for a named wallet/transaction or stable adapter.

title: GitlWab / GitLawb / Gitwab
open_questions: Measure Node/CLI v0.7.0 agents, repos, verified certificates, active nodes and repeat pushes; map each buyback-vault flush to upstream USDC and Ads/OpenGateway/x402 net revenue; monitor supply/LP/LayerZero controls, Zero adoption, Blockagent MCP economics, Ads cohorts, model checkpoints and voting economics.

title: Kinetiq
open_questions: Attribute KNTQ buyback funding and sKNTQ distributions by revenue source; verify final kPoints execution/recipient totals and post-distribution staking behavior; monitor supply/unlocks and Markets/Launch concentration.

title: GRASS
open_questions: Verify revenue/customer concentration, recurring GRASS value routing, canonical mint/supply/unlocks, aggregate Stage 2 USDC claims/claimants/failures and operator retention, wallet security/fees, and Live Context Retrieval launch/usage.

title: IOTA — Macrocosmos Bittensor Subnet 9
open_questions: Reproduce Orion-100B quality, speed and cost claims; verify paid training demand/revenue, Train at Home retention/rewards, orchestrator/validator decentralization, SN9 emissions/value capture and the next model release.

title: Targon — Bittensor Subnet 4
open_questions: Verify TargonOS 0.1.0 trust-root/audit/reproducibility, node adoption, updates/rollback and reliability; verify Tower reservations, delivery, realized utilization/ROI and the 5090 KYC-only constraint; reproduce workloads and the 2,000 TAO/month buyback proxy.

title: TAO / Bittensor
open_questions: Verify paid production use of the live YanezYID apps and named Syklo/Nexartis integrations, registry growth, incentive mechanics and onchain SN54 revenue-to-alpha execution; reopen the stale Bitsec detail check only for a report, patch or incident artifact.

title: AKT / Akash
open_questions: Verify post-proposal-329 revenue routing/value capture, sustained daily spend growth, high-end GPU utilization and OpenRouter/AkashML inference demand. PR #400 production rollout was closed stale on 2026-07-21; reopen only for a stable release, advertised provider capacity and a named paid multi-node workload.

title: CHIP / USD.AI
open_questions: Duration/NIM design remains exploratory with no proposal as of 2026-07-20; reopen only for official parameters/contracts. Reconcile issuer TVL/APY and facility notional vs deployed loans; validate SPV/UCC/DACA, insurance, defaults/recoveries, collateral/escrow, value routing and CHIP liquidity.

title: VVV / Venice AI
open_questions: Track public VVV/DIEM supply, staking and utilization data; reconcile API `totalSupply` to ERC-20 supply; verify cooldown/unlock constraints, emissions vs burns, paid-revenue linkage, contract controls and app-attributed usage.

title: VIRTUAL / Virtuals Protocol
open_questions: Map Base/Robinhood tax-manager ownership, 1% fee split/use and any VIRTUAL buyback/burn/staking route; reconcile Robinhood volume/earnings and measure Binance Wallet campaign volume, unique/repeat traders and post-August-5 retention; quantify mandatory VIRTUAL-pairing cost and pool demand. Reopen primary/exclusive or brokerage-MCP claims only for explicit counterpart/implementation evidence.

title: Worldcoin / WLD / World Network
open_questions: Track the Grayscale Worldcoin ETF S-1 through effectiveness, Nasdaq eligibility/listing, fees, launch and WLD flows; verify World Chain SP1 deployment/audits and prior Nitro-path exposure; after WIP-1008's documentation-only spec merge, monitor implementation, WLD stake/reward/slashing parameters, contracts, audits, governance and activation.

title: NEAR Protocol
open_questions: Monitor 10-shard Protocol v86 health, later splits and ML-DSA adoption; measure OutLayer contract-native Intents swaps/volume/failures/fees plus Infinex/Aurora/EURe usage; define NEAR@3.33 claims; reconcile gross fees, net revenue, buybacks and emissions; measure Corbits/x402 delivery.

title: DRV / Derive Protocol
open_questions: Monitor whether thin non-KRW books become meaningful; map Buyback #76 to execution transactions/fee windows; verify v3 only on release artifacts and ORIA only on a live Derive-labeled surface; continue governance, canonical-contract, organic-fee, HYPE/kHYPE risk and supply-proposal checks.

title: OCT / Octra
open_questions: June TAPE/node timing is stale; verify a versioned supported release, license/builds/configs/operators and audit. Canonical Ethereum bridge addresses are documented; audit roles/reserves/round trips and Hyperliquid prerequisites remain open.

title: BIO / Bio Protocol
open_questions: Verify VitaApp public access, users/subscription revenue, encryption/audit and VITA discount contracts plus any BIO/veBIO route; continue lock/reward and sale KPIs, canonical contracts/unlocks, science milestones and transaction-level methodology for Bio's ecosystem counters.

title: Pluralis
open_questions: Verify token/economic rights, model ownership and Agora external compute. Stoa's full independent rerun is closed stale for the autonomous queue; reopen only for third-party logs/checkpoints/costs, a public checkpoint or a bounded funded reproduction.

title: Ambient
category: Crypto AI / verified inference / useful PoW
open_questions: Verify mainnet/TGE/final tokenomics, permissionless miner rollout, canonical auction deployment and Proof of Logits security/audits. OpenRouter now verifies provider-route token volume; organic paid share, revenue/margin and AMB value capture remain unavailable.

title: EIGEN / EigenCloud (prev: EigenLayer)

title: Chutes — Bittensor Subnet 64
open_questions: Measure post-July-24 traffic/revenue-per-token after the Harvard 25% research discount and recording endpoint close; reconcile remaining hidden incentives, provider expenses/gross margin and integration-attributed volume. Reopen Parallax only for artifacts, replication or paid revenue.

title: Lium — Bittensor Subnet 51
open_questions: Reconcile official validator-revenue and utilization APIs to gross renter payments, provider payout, platform fee and customer concentration; map the June 2,500 TAO buyback/burn wallet and repeat cadence; monitor Kraken liquidity and whether Lium adds managed inference.

title: Compute Horde — Bittensor Subnet 12
open_questions: Organic Jobs Grafana/API is mapped; its July 16–23 slice was 87.22% health probes. Verify whether GS jobs are paid, billings/validator economics, customer retention, current GPU inventory/utilization, and why SN12 can win versus newer compute subnets.
